name: real-time-field-validation
outcome_goal: Validate workflow spec fields and MCP tool inputs incrementally as the operator types, not only at submit time. Extract the static rules already expressed in `runtime/workflow_spec.py` (required fields, value ranges, string constraints) into a zod or TypeScript schema that the app can consume. Wire the Moon build page's spec form to run per-field validation against the schema on blur, surfacing inline errors. Mirror the same validation on the server so the contract stays single-source: the Python validator and the TS zod schema are generated from one declaration. Small scope — this is about per-field real-time feedback, not a full form framework.
anti_requirements: Do not introduce a form library. Validation hooks directly into existing inputs.
Do not duplicate the contract — one declaration generates both Python and zod validators.
